src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Replace the generic @EnableDiscoveryClient with the specific @EnableEurekaClient to align with Spring Cloud Netflix Eureka usage.
Remove the @EnableCircuitBreaker annotation, likely due to a change in how circuit breaking is enabled or configured in the target Spring Cloud version.
Removed imports for classes that are no longer used in the controller after refactoring.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Removed imports for @Autowired, HttpStatus, CurrencyConversionRepository, and HystrixCommand.

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Added import for the new utility class handling data access logic.
Removed the autowired repository field as logic was moved to a static utility class.
Removed the Hystrix command annotation from the endpoint, likely due to library removal or deprecation in the target environment.
Replaced direct repository calls with static utility method calls for saving currency data.
Modernized response creation by using the static factory method instead of the constructor.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Replaced new ResponseEntity<>(..., HttpStatus.OK) with ResponseEntity.ok(...).

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Replaced direct repository calls with static utility method calls for retrieving currency data.
Updated the fallback method signature to accept a request body, aligning with the original method's parameters.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Added @RequestBody CurrencyConversion currencyConversion parameter to getDataFallBack.

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Changed the log level in the fallback method from info to error to better reflect the exceptional nature of the call.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Changed log.info("In fallback method...") to log.error("In fallback method...").

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Updated the fallback entity creation to use a constructor that no longer requires an ID field, suggesting a change in the entity definition.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Changed new CurrencyConversion(5478,"USA",1.00) to new CurrencyConversion("USA",1.00).

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Removed JPA annotations (@Entity, @Table, @Id, @GeneratedValue, @Column) to strip persistence metadata from the class.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Removed imports for javax.persistence.* and annotations @Entity, @Table, @Id, @GeneratedValue, @Column.

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Removed validation constraints (@NotEmpty, @NotNull) and their associated imports.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Removed imports for javax.validation.constraints.NotEmpty and com.sun.istack.NotNull, and removed annotations from fields.

src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.general_idea: Removed the @NonNull annotation from the class imports, likely due to removal of validation logic.
Removed the 'id' field and its associated JPA annotations, effectively changing the class from an entity to a simple DTO.
src/main/java/com/example/SpringConversi.human_impl: Removed private Integer id field and its @Id and @GeneratedValue annotations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.7.17 to support Java 17.
Update the Java version property to 17.
Update Spring Cloud dependencies to version 2021.0.8 compatible with Spring Boot 2.7.
Remove Hystrix dependency as it is deprecated in newer Spring Cloud versions.
Remove Spring Data JPA starter dependency.
Add Spring Boot Actuator starter dependency.

Dockerfile.general_idea: The base image remains openjdk:8-jdk-alpine, but the comments were cleaned up to remove references to Java 11 and clarify the application type.
The JAR file name was updated to match the new version (0.0.2-SNAPSHOT) and a different naming convention (springconversionfactor.jar).
Explicitly expose port 8061 for the application to listen on.
The entrypoint was updated to use the new JAR file name (springconversionfactor.jar) instead of the old one (app.jar).
The WORKDIR instruction was removed, implying the JAR is added to the root directory or the default working directory is used.
Old comments and instructions for running Docker containers were removed and replaced with concise comments.
Dockerfile.human_impl: Removed sudo docker run comments and added concise comments
